name: Laurans Mendelson
background: Laurans A. Mendelson has served as HEICO’s Chairman of the Board and Chief Executive Officer since 1990 and as its President from 1991 to 2024. He is also the father of Eric A. Mendelson and Victor H. Mendelson.

companies.name: HEICO Corporation
companies.title_or_role: Chairman of the Board and Chief Executive Officer
